hero.subtitle1: Small civic issues become big problems when nobody reports them.
hero.title2_pt1: Report potholes, garbage overflow, broken streetlights, and damaged roads

trust.title: Community Powered Impact
trust.subtitle: Every day, citizens like you are making a difference by identifying local problems and holding the city accountable.

reports.title: Recent Community Reports
reports.subtitle: See what your neighbors are reporting to improve the city.

form.title: Report a Civic Issue
form.locationInput: Search or describe the location (e.g., Near Andheri Station)

map.gpsDesc: Allow access to your device's location to accurately pin the issue on the map. This helps authorities resolve it faster.
map.skip: Skip for now, I'll search manually
map.dragPin: Drag the map to pinpoint the exact location.

footer.title: CivicReport Mumbai
footer.desc: Empowering citizens to report local issues, track progress, and build better neighborhoods together.
